name: miso-contract-dashboard
description: 미소방문이사(586) confirming 주문의 오늘 계약(결제 일시 기준) 실시간 집계 대시보드

scripts.build:hosting: mkdir -p public && cp index.html miso-logo.svg firebase-sync.js metrics.js miso-api.js miso-sheets.js idb-sync.js pwa-register.js sw.js manifest.webmanifest public/
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build:hosting && firebase deploy --only hosting:mvc-contract-cdb96
scripts.deploy:api: npm run build:functions && firebase deploy --only functions:api
scripts.deploy:all: npm run build:hosting && npm run build:functions && firebase deploy --only functions:api,hosting:mvc-contract-cdb96,firestore:rules
